tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The results indicate poor glycemic control (elevated HbA1c and fasting glucose), consistent with diabetes mellitus. There is also dyslipidemia (high total cholesterol, LDL, and triglycerides), increasing cardiovascular risk. Renal function and electrolytes are within normal limits, and there is no evidence of microalbuminuria. Recommend clinical follow-up for diabetes and lipid management.

text.div: Provider Organization: Conan Doyle Medical Centre

tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
